name: qwen-tentacles
description: Multi-model AI tentacles powered by Qwen 3.5 models. Provides specialized sub-agents for code review, analysis, translation, vision tasks, and autonomous research using various Qwen 3.5 model sizes.
author: iHhashi

flagship.use: Complex reasoning, architecture decisions, code generation

large.use: Code review, detailed analysis, multi-step planning

tentacles.code-review: Review code changes with large model
tentacles.architect: Design system architecture with flagship model
tentacles.translate: Translate content to SA languages with medium model
